filterName: Raw Document to Filter Events Step
overview: Extracts the content of a raw document into a set of filter events using the document's associated filter configuration. This step is typically the first step in a pipeline, but can be placed after any step that sends a raw document. To convert back from filter events to a raw document, use the **Filter Events to Raw Document Step**.
processingNotes: The raw document must have an associated filter configuration for extraction to work.
A minimal extract-then-merge pipeline can be built with just this step followed by the **Filter Events to Raw Document Step**.

examples.title: Minimal extract and merge pipeline
examples.description: The simplest pipeline that extracts filter events from a raw document and then merges them back. This is useful as a round-trip validation or as a starting template for more complex pipelines.
examples.config:
```
Raw Document to Filter Events Step
  + Filter Events to Raw Document Step
```
